title: Disrupted glial-mediated synaptic refinement in Fragile X syndrome.
abstract: Multi-omic framework on FXS model mice at P7 in the retinogeniculate pathway. scRNA-seq reveals coordinated alterations in microglia, astrocytes, neurons in synaptic pruning genes. Computational modeling shows enhanced astrocyte-to-microglia signaling via EphA and semaphorin pathways. Glial engulfment assay confirms over-engulfment of synaptic material.
